_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values.

printer._tcpComment: Used when mode is 'tcp'. Point the Verifone POS to THIS machine's IP on proxyPort.
printer._usbComment: Used when mode is 'usb'. The real printer COM port (e.g. COM3).

qr._sizeComment: QR module size for thermal printer: 1–16. 5 prints ~2cm square.
qr.printMessage: Scan with Lucky Stop app to earn cashback!

_tokenExpiryComment: Minutes before the receipt QR code expires.
